column1: My cousins sold their car. They have ___ their car.
I told a story. I have ___ a story.
They saw my friend. They have ___ my friend.
We cleaned our room. We have ___ our room.
I flew to Mexico City. I have ___ to Mexico City.
I thought about going on vacation. I have ___ about going vacation.
I spoke to Mary about you. I have ___ to Mary about you.
She chose the blue pants. She has ___ the blue pants.
